sentences.sentence: Bats have a problem: how to find their way around in the dark.
sentences.translation: 蝙蝠面临一个问题：如何在黑暗中找到方向。

structure.text: Bats
have
a problem
how to find their way around in the dark

difficult_points: 冒号后 how to... 是 a problem 的同位语，具体说明问题内容。
find one's way around 表示‘四处找到方向、顺利行动’。

sentences.sentence: They hunt at night, and cannot use light to help them find prey and avoid obstacles.
sentences.translation: 它们在夜间捕猎，无法利用光线帮助自己寻找猎物和避开障碍物。

structure.text: They
hunt at night, and cannot use light
to help them find prey and avoid obstacles

difficult_points: to help... 是目的不定式，说明使用光线的目的。
find prey 和 avoid obstacles 是 help 后并列的无 to 不定式。

sentences.sentence: You might say that this is a problem of their own making, one that they could avoid simply by changing their habits and hunting by day.
sentences.translation: 你或许会说，这是它们自己造成的问题，只要改变习性、改在白天捕猎就能避免。

structure.text: You might say
that this is a problem of their own making
one that they could avoid simply by changing their habits and hunting by day
that they could avoid simply by changing their habits and hunting by day

difficult_points: that 引导 say 的宾语从句；one that... 是对 problem 的补充说明。
by changing... and hunting... 是介词 by 加并列动名词，表示避免问题的方法。

sentences.sentence: But the daytime economy is already heavily exploited by other creatures such as birds.
sentences.translation: 但白天的生态资源已经被鸟类等其他生物充分利用了。

structure.text: the daytime economy
is already heavily exploited
by other creatures such as birds

difficult_points: is exploited 是被动语态，主语是被利用的 daytime economy。
such as birds 举例说明 other creatures。

sentences.sentence: Given that there is a living to be made at night, and given that alternative daytime trades are thoroughly occupied, natural selection has favoured bats that make a go of the night-hunting trade.
sentences.translation: 鉴于夜间可以谋生，且白天的其他生态‘行业’已经被充分占据，自然选择偏向了那些在夜间捕猎中闯出一条路的蝙蝠。

structure.text: Given that there is a living to be made at night
given that alternative daytime trades are thoroughly occupied
natural selection
has favoured
bats that make a go of the night-hunting trade
that make a go of the night-hunting trade

difficult_points: 两个 Given that 从句表示考虑到的事实和原因。
that make a go... 修饰 bats；make a go of 表示‘努力把……做成功’。

sentences.sentence: It is probable that the nocturnal trades go way back in the ancestry of all mammals.
sentences.translation: 很可能，夜间活动可以追溯到所有哺乳动物的祖先时期。

structure.text: It is probable
that the nocturnal trades go way back in the ancestry of all mammals

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 that 引导的从句。
go way back 表示‘追溯到很久以前’。

sentences.sentence: In the time when the dinosaurs dominated the daytime economy, our mammalian ancestors probably only managed to survive at all because they found ways of scraping a living at night.
sentences.translation: 在恐龙主宰白天生态资源的时代，我们的哺乳动物祖先之所以能够生存下来，可能只是因为它们找到了夜间勉强谋生的方法。

structure.text: In the time when the dinosaurs dominated the daytime economy
when the dinosaurs dominated the daytime economy
our mammalian ancestors
probably only managed to survive at all
because they found ways of scraping a living at night

difficult_points: when the dinosaurs... 修饰 the time；because 从句说明祖先能够存活的原因。
manage to survive 表示‘设法生存下来’，scrape a living 表示勉强谋生。

sentences.sentence: Only after the mysterious mass extinction of the dinosaurs about 65 million years ago were our ancestors able to emerge into the daylight in any substantial numbers.
sentences.translation: 直到大约6500万年前神秘的恐龙大灭绝之后，我们的祖先才得以大量进入白昼世界。

structure.text: Only after the mysterious mass extinction of the dinosaurs about 65 million years ago
were our ancestors able to emerge into the daylight in any substantial numbers

difficult_points: Only after 置于句首导致部分倒装，助动词 were 提前。
in any substantial numbers 表示‘以相当大的数量、大量地’。

sentences.sentence: Bats have an engineering problem: how to find their way and find their prey in the absence of light.
sentences.translation: 蝙蝠面临一个工程学问题：如何在没有光线的情况下找到方向和猎物。

structure.text: Bats
have
an engineering problem
how to find their way and find their prey in the absence of light

difficult_points: how to... 是 problem 的同位语，说明工程问题的具体内容。
in the absence of light 表示‘在没有光线时’。

sentences.sentence: Bats are not the only creatures to face this difficulty today.
sentences.translation: 蝙蝠并不是今天唯一面临这一困难的生物。

structure.text: Bats
are not
the only creatures to face this difficulty today
to face this difficulty today

difficult_points: to face... 是不定式后置修饰 the only creatures。
not the only 表示‘并非唯一的’。

sentences.sentence: Obviously the night-flying insects that they prey on must find their way about somehow.
sentences.translation: 显然，作为它们猎物的夜行昆虫也一定要设法找到方向。

structure.text: Obviously
the night-flying insects that they prey on
that they prey on
must find their way about somehow

difficult_points: that they prey on 是定语从句，that 在从句中作介词 on 的宾语。
must 表示合乎逻辑的推断，somehow 表示‘以某种方式’。

sentences.sentence: Deep-sea fish and whales have little or no light by day or by night.
sentences.translation: 深海鱼类和鲸鱼无论白天还是夜晚都几乎没有光线。

structure.text: Deep-sea fish and whales
have
little or no light
by day or by night

difficult_points: little or no 表示‘很少甚至没有’。
by day or by night 表示‘无论白天还是夜晚’。

sentences.sentence: Fish and dolphins that live in extremely muddy water cannot see because, although there is light, it is obstructed and scattered by the dirt in the water.
sentences.translation: 生活在极其浑浊水域的鱼和海豚看不见东西，因为尽管有光线，它也被水中的泥沙阻挡并散射了。

structure.text: Fish and dolphins that live in extremely muddy water
that live in extremely muddy water
cannot see
because, although there is light, it is obstructed and scattered by the dirt in the water
although there is light

difficult_points: that live... 修饰 Fish and dolphins；because 从句说明看不见的原因。
although 引导让步从句，it 指代 light，后面是被动并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: Plenty of other modern animals make their living in conditions where seeing is difficult or impossible.
sentences.translation: 许多其他现代动物也在视觉困难或不可能发挥作用的环境中谋生。

structure.text: Plenty of other modern animals
make their living
in conditions where seeing is difficult or impossible
where seeing is difficult or impossible

difficult_points: where 引导定语从句，修饰 conditions。
seeing 是动名词作从句主语，指视觉活动。

sentences.sentence: Given the questions of how to manoeuvre in the dark, what solutions might an engineer consider?
sentences.translation: 面对如何在黑暗中行动的问题，工程师可能会考虑哪些解决方案？

structure.text: Given the questions of how to manoeuvre in the dark
how to manoeuvre in the dark
what solutions
might an engineer consider

difficult_points: Given... 是分词化介词结构，表示‘考虑到、面对’。
what solutions 是疑问词组作 consider 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: The first one that might occur to him is to manufacture light, to use a lantern or a searchlight.
sentences.translation: 他首先可能想到的办法是制造光线，使用提灯或探照灯。

structure.text: The first one that might occur to him
that might occur to him
is
to manufacture light, to use a lantern or a searchlight

difficult_points: that might occur to him 修饰 one，occur to sb 表示‘某人想到’。
两个 to 不定式并列，解释办法的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Fireflies and some fish (usually with the help of bacteria) have the power to manufacture their own light, but the process seems to consume a large amount of energy.
sentences.translation: 萤火虫和一些鱼类（通常借助细菌）能够制造自己的光，但这一过程似乎会消耗大量能量。

structure.text: Fireflies and some fish
usually with the help of bacteria
have the power to manufacture their own light
but the process seems to consume a large amount of energy

difficult_points: with the help of bacteria 是插入的介词短语，说明制造光线的辅助条件。
seem to consume 表示‘似乎消耗’，to consume 是 seem 的不定式补语。

sentences.sentence: Fireflies use their light for attracting mates.
sentences.translation: 萤火虫利用自己的光来吸引配偶。

structure.text: Fireflies
use
their light
for attracting mates

difficult_points: use A for doing 表示‘用A来做某事’。
mates 指交配对象或配偶，不是普通朋友。

sentences.sentence: This doesn't require a prohibitive amount of energy: a male's tiny pinprick of light can be seen by a female from some distance on a dark night, since her eyes are exposed directly to the light source itself.
sentences.translation: 这并不需要多得难以承受的能量：在漆黑的夜晚，雌性萤火虫从一定距离就能看到雄性微小的一点亮光，因为她的眼睛直接暴露在光源本身面前。

structure.text: This doesn't require a prohibitive amount of energy
a male's tiny pinprick of light can be seen by a female from some distance on a dark night
since her eyes are exposed directly to the light source itself

difficult_points: can be seen by a female 是被动语态，by 短语表示观察者。
since 引导原因从句，itself 强调光源本身。

sentences.sentence: However, using light to find one's own way around requires vastly more energy, since the eyes have to detect the tiny fraction of the light that bounces off each part of the scene.
sentences.translation: 然而，利用光线为自己辨路需要多得多的能量，因为眼睛必须探测从场景各个部分反射回来的一小部分光线。

structure.text: using light to find one's own way around
requires vastly more energy
since the eyes have to detect the tiny fraction of the light
that bounces off each part of the scene

difficult_points: using light... 是动名词短语作主语。
that bounces off... 修饰 light，bounces off 表示‘从……反射’。

sentences.sentence: The light source must therefore be immensely brighter if it is to be used as a headlight to illuminate the path, than if it is to be used as a signal to others.
sentences.translation: 因此，如果光源要用作照亮道路的前灯，就必须比用作向他人发出的信号亮得多。

structure.text: The light source
must therefore be immensely brighter
if it is to be used as a headlight to illuminate the path
than if it is to be used as a signal to others

difficult_points: if it is to be used 表示‘如果要被用来……’，是被动的不定式结构。
than if... 构成比较，比较两种用途所需的光源亮度。

sentences.sentence: In any event, whether or not the reason is the energy expense, it seems to be the case that, with the possible exception of some weird deep-sea fish, no animal apart from man uses manufactured light to find its way about.
sentences.translation: 无论如何，不管原因是否在于能量开销，事实似乎是，除了某些奇怪的深海鱼之外，没有哪种动物像人类一样使用人造光来辨路。

structure.text: In any event
whether or not the reason is the energy expense
it seems to be the case that
with the possible exception of some weird deep-sea fish
no animal apart from man uses manufactured light to find its way about

difficult_points: whether or not 引导让步从句，表示‘不管是否’。
it seems to be the case that 是固定表达，that 从句是真正内容；apart from 表示‘除了’。

expressions.text: it seems to be the case that

sentences.sentence: What else might the engineer think of?
sentences.translation: 工程师还可能想到什么？

structure.text: What else
might the engineer think of

difficult_points: What else 是 think of 的宾语，介词 of 保留在句末。
might 表示推测或可能性。

sentences.sentence: Well, blind humans sometimes seem to have an uncanny sense of obstacles in their path.
sentences.translation: 嗯，盲人有时似乎对道路上的障碍有一种不可思议的感知力。

structure.text: blind humans
sometimes seem to have
an uncanny sense of obstacles in their path

difficult_points: seem to have 表示‘似乎拥有’。
obstacles in their path 中 in their path 修饰 obstacles。

sentences.sentence: It has been given the name 'facial vision', because blind people have reported that it feels a bit like the sense of touch, on the face.
sentences.translation: 这种能力被称为‘面部视觉’，因为盲人报告说，它感觉有点像脸部的触觉。

structure.text: It has been given the name 'facial vision'
because blind people have reported that it feels a bit like the sense of touch, on the face
that it feels a bit like the sense of touch, on the face

difficult_points: has been given 是现在完成时被动语态，it 指代这种感知能力。
that 从句作 reported 的宾语，on the face 是补充说明感觉位置。

sentences.sentence: One report tells of a totally blind boy who could ride his tricycle at good speed round the block near his home, using facial vision.
sentences.translation: 一份报告讲述了一个完全失明的男孩，他利用面部视觉，能够以很快的速度绕着家附近的街区骑三轮车。

structure.text: One report
tells of
a totally blind boy who could ride his tricycle at good speed round the block near his home
who could ride his tricycle at good speed round the block near his home
using facial vision

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 a totally blind boy。
using facial vision 是现在分词短语，说明男孩骑车时采用的方式。

sentences.sentence: Experiments showed that, in fact, facial vision is nothing to do with touch or the front of the face, although the sensation may be referred to the front of the face, like the referred pain in a phantom limb.
sentences.translation: 实验表明，事实上，面部视觉与触觉或面部前方毫无关系，尽管这种感觉可能被定位在面部前方，就像幻肢的牵涉痛一样。

structure.text: Experiments showed
that, in fact, facial vision is nothing to do with touch or the front of the face
although the sensation may be referred to the front of the face
like the referred pain in a phantom limb

difficult_points: be nothing to do with 表示‘与……毫无关系’。
although 引导让步从句，may be referred to 是被动语态；like 短语作类比。

sentences.sentence: The sensation of facial vision, it turns out, really goes in through the ears.
sentences.translation: 事实证明，面部视觉的感觉实际上是通过耳朵进入的。

structure.text: The sensation of facial vision
it turns out
really goes in through the ears

difficult_points: it turns out 是插入语，意为‘事实证明’。
goes in through the ears 使用 through 表示进入的通道。

sentences.sentence: Blind people, without even being aware of the fact, are actually using echoes of their own footsteps and of other sounds, to sense the presence of obstacles.
sentences.translation: 盲人甚至没有意识到这一点，却实际上在利用自己脚步声和其他声音的回声来感知障碍物的存在。

structure.text: Blind people
without even being aware of the fact
are actually using echoes of their own footsteps and of other sounds
to sense the presence of obstacles

difficult_points: without even being aware... 是介词加动名词结构，说明盲人并不自知。
to sense... 是目的不定式；of their own footsteps 和 of other sounds 并列修饰 echoes。

sentences.sentence: Before this was discovered, engineers had already built instruments to exploit the principle, for example to measure the depth of the sea under a ship.
sentences.translation: 在这一点被发现之前，工程师们早已制造出利用这一原理的仪器，例如测量船下海水的深度。

structure.text: Before this was discovered
engineers had already built instruments
to exploit the principle
for example to measure the depth of the sea under a ship

difficult_points: Before 从句使用被动语态，this 指代回声感知原理。
had already built 是过去完成时，表示早于‘被发现’这一过去事件。

sentences.sentence: After this technique had been invented, it was only a matter of time before weapons designers adapted it for the detection of submarines.
sentences.translation: 这项技术发明之后，武器设计师将它改用于探测潜艇只是时间问题。

structure.text: After this technique had been invented
it was only a matter of time
before weapons designers adapted it for the detection of submarines

difficult_points: had been invented 是过去完成时被动语态，表示技术发明先于改用。
a matter of time before... 表示‘……只是时间问题’。

expressions.meaning_zh: 时间问题；迟早会发生的事

sentences.sentence: Both sides in the Second World War relied heavily on these devices, under such codenames as Asdic (British) and Sonar (American), as well as Radar (American) or RDF (British), which uses radio echoes rather than sound echoes.
sentences.translation: 第二次世界大战中的双方都高度依赖这些设备，使用了Asdic（英国）和Sonar（美国）等代号，以及Radar（美国）或RDF（英国）；后者利用无线电回波而非声音回波。

structure.text: Both sides in the Second World War
relied heavily on these devices
under such codenames as Asdic (British) and Sonar (American), as well as Radar (American) or RDF (British)
which uses radio echoes rather than sound echoes

difficult_points: under such codenames as... 列举设备使用的代号。
which 引导定语从句，修饰前面的 RDF，rather than 表示‘而不是’。

sentences.sentence: The Sonar and Radar pioneers didn't know it then, but all the world now knows that bats, or rather natural selection working on bats, had perfected the system tens of millions of years earlier, and their 'radar' achieves feats of detection and navigation that would strike an engineer dumb with admiration.
sentences.translation: 声呐和雷达的先驱当时并不知道，但如今全世界都知道，蝙蝠——更准确地说，是作用于蝙蝠的自然选择——早在数千万年前就完善了这一系统，而它们的‘雷达’在探测和导航方面的成就足以令工程师赞叹得说不出话来。

structure.text: The Sonar and Radar pioneers didn't know it then
but all the world now knows that bats, or rather natural selection working on bats, had perfected the system tens of millions of years earlier
or rather natural selection working on bats
and their 'radar' achieves feats of detection and navigation
that would strike an engineer dumb with admiration

difficult_points: or rather 插入语对 bats 作更准确的修正，working on bats 是分词短语。
had perfected 表示完善系统发生在过去某一参照点之前；that 修饰 feats。

expressions.meaning_zh: 令某人赞叹得说不出话
探测和导航方面的非凡成就

sentences.sentence: It is technically incorrect to talk about bat 'radar', since they do not use radio waves.
sentences.translation: 从技术上说，把蝙蝠的系统称为‘雷达’是不正确的，因为它们并不使用无线电波。

structure.text: It is technically incorrect
to talk about bat 'radar'
since they do not use radio waves

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 to talk about...。
since 引导原因从句，they 指代 bats。

sentences.sentence: It is sonar.
sentences.translation: 它其实是声呐。

structure.text: It
is
sonar

difficult_points: It 指代前文所说的蝙蝠‘radar’系统。
is sonar 是对术语的简短纠正，说明蝙蝠使用的是声呐。

sentences.sentence: But the underlying mathematical theories of radar and sonar are very similar, and much of our scientific understanding of the details of what bats are doing has come from applying radar theory to them.
sentences.translation: 但雷达和声呐背后的数学理论非常相似，而我们对蝙蝠行为细节的大量科学认识，都来自将雷达理论应用于它们。

structure.text: the underlying mathematical theories of radar and sonar
are very similar
and much of our scientific understanding of the details of what bats are doing has come from applying radar theory to them
what bats are doing
from applying radar theory to them

difficult_points: what bats are doing 是介词 of 后的宾语从句，说明 details 的内容。
come from applying... 中 applying 是动名词，说明科学认识的来源。

sentences.sentence: The American zoologist Donald Griffin, who was largely responsible for the discovery of sonar in bats, coined the term 'echolocation' to cover both sonar and radar, whether used by animals or by human instruments.
sentences.translation: 美国动物学家唐纳德·格里芬在蝙蝠声呐的发现中负有主要责任，他创造了‘回声定位’一词，用来涵盖动物或人类仪器所使用的声呐和雷达。

structure.text: The American zoologist Donald Griffin
who was largely responsible for the discovery of sonar in bats
coined the term 'echolocation'
to cover both sonar and radar
whether used by animals or by human instruments

difficult_points: who 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 Griffin 的贡献。
whether used by animals or by human instruments 是省略结构，完整形式是 whether they are used...。
